# Leap Parkour

> Leap Parkour (LeapParkour z.s.) is the largest parkour community in the Vysočina region (Czech Republic), operating since 2015. We organize parkour lessons (kroužky) for children in Havlíčkův Brod and an annual summer camp called LeapCamp.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://leapparkour.cz
- Legal Name: LeapParkour z.s.
- ID (IČO): 07195320
- Email: leapparkour@seznam.cz
- Address: Práčat 1886, Havlíčkův Brod, Czech Republic
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/leapparkour/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/YG84oj6nvVgR4NvM/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@LeapParkour

## Main Offerings

### Parkour Lessons (Kroužky)
- Location: ZŠ Wolkerova (gymnasium) during winter, outdoor parkour park Plovárenská during summer, Havlíčkův Brod.
- Target Audience: Children aged 6 to 16, divided by skill level (beginners, intermediate, advanced).
- Semester: Spring 2027
- Price: Single week lesson: 2,950 CZK / semester, Twice week lesson: 4,600 CZK / semester.
- URL: https://leapparkour.cz/krouzek

### LeapCamp (Summer Camp)
- Location: RS Radost, Nová Ves u Světlé (near Světlá nad Sázavou).
- Target Audience: Children aged 8 to 16.
- Edition: 10th year (Leap Camp 2027)
- Dates: 4. 7. – 11. 7. 2027
- Price: 7,450 CZK.
- Activities: Parkour training, team games (NERF), self-defense, street dance, crossfit, archery, video editing, zipline, slackline, paddleboarding.
- URL: https://leapparkour.cz/tabor

### Registrations
- Dynamic forms for joining the parkour club or signing up for the LeapCamp: https://leapparkour.cz/prihlaska

### Blog & Articles
- Educational content about parkour for kids, safety protocols, and camp details: https://leapparkour.cz/blog
- "Proč je parkour skvělý sport pro zdravý vývoj dětí?" - https://leapparkour.cz/blog/proc-je-parkour-skvely-sport-pro-deti
- "Bezpečnost při parkouru: Mýty versus realita" - https://leapparkour.cz/blog/bezpecnost-pri-parkouru-myty-vs-realita
- "Leap Camp: Co čekat od nejlepšího parkourového tábora?" - https://leapparkour.cz/blog/tabor-leap-camp-pohyb-zabava-kamaradi
